project.name: Rootstock
project.summary: A 40-seat seasonal American restaurant in the Jersey City and Hoboken area. Total project cost 465000 dollars, funded by 50000 owner equity, a 165000 SBA 7(a) loan, and 250000 investor equity. Target opening third quarter 2027.

workstream.name: Concept and Brand
workstream.task: Lock the concept, 40 seats, open kitchen, optional tasting menu
Write the brand story around the recipe binder
Finish the pitch decks for investor conversations

workstream.name: Financials
workstream.task: Finish three year profit and loss projections
Get pre-qualified with an SBA preferred lender

milestone.name: Owner equity target
milestone.note: In Harbor Savings high-yield, about 850 a month

workstream.name: Location
workstream.task: Evaluate and rank eight candidate spaces
View lead candidate, 214 Elm Street, Hoboken
Sign lease or letter of intent

candidate.note: Hood and grease trap in place, eight minutes from the train

workstream.name: Menu and Sourcing
workstream.task: Test cultured butter and celery root puree
Maintain direct relationships with Hudson Valley farms
